summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Taron Technology ERP system. Backend APIs are 100% functional with all 28 tests passing. Frontend UI is working correctly with successful navigation, role-based access control, and proper data display. All major CRUD operations are functional through both API and UI.

ui_bugs.issue: No error message displayed for invalid login credentials

passed_tests: Dashboard stats display with correct role-based data
Project management (create, view, team leader assignment)
Attendance tracking with working hours calculation
